emails.subject: Re: Superior Water Light & Power
emails.body: Re: Superior Water Light Power The only transaction I see out there is a long-term Firm transaction (Deal #487399, Tagg #Q99410, Transactio Term 12/01/00 02/28/01) currently riding on the GISB (K#96053067) per the 11/30/00 discussions. Ellen can confirm if a confirmation went out what contract was referenced on the Confirmation. Please let us know if we should take any further action. Thanks! Cyndie DEBRA PERLINGIERE@ECT 12/12/2000 03:13 PM

emails.subject: Re: Superior Water Light & Power
emails.body: Re: Superior Water Light Power Well I guess that makes me a double goober! I just want to make sure a confirm was sent to Superior. I will generate another GISB for execution. The confirm or a copy of same should be directed to Bill Bombich Fax 715-395-6300, phone 715-395-6288. Thanks!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! Debra Perlingiere Enron North America Corp. Legal Department 1400 Smith Street, EB 3885 Houston, Texas 77002 dperlin@enron.com Phone 713-853-7658 Fax 713-646-3490
